parsed_review.summary: CP00-939 is a descriptor-only HRX AuditFixture/SyntheticTenant bridge across RP30.P05.M05.S02-RP30.P05.M06.S02 (10 units: 8 AuditFixture security_audit at M05.S02-S09 + 2 SyntheticTenant implementation at M06.S01-S02). The pack-level claim is hrx_audit_fixture_synthetic_tenant_bridge_descriptor_verified with production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false, and that claim is fully supported. Verified by direct read-only inspection (no commands were re-executed; exit codes below are as reported in command-evidence.json): (1) prompt.txt, review-baseline.json, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, and HRX_CP939_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:797) all agree on range, unit_count=10, deliverable split 8/2, micro_title split AuditFixture 8 / SyntheticTenant 2, and next CP00-940/RP30.P05.M06.S03; (2) HRX_CP939_REQUIRED_SECTION_ROWS (registry.js:3052) binds M05 AuditFixture subphase 2-9 and M06 SyntheticTenant subphase 1-2, and createHrxDomainRows sets every runtime/record-write/real-data/runtime-receipt/permission-bypass/fixture-runtime flag false while tagging M05 rows as audit_fixture_security_audit_descriptor; (3) validators.js validateHrxCp939AuditFixtureSyntheticTenantBridgeCoverage/Descriptor (7355,7394) enforce each boundary and correctly separate AuditFixture (M05) from SyntheticTenant (M06) via rowChecks/entityChecks; (4) model.test.js has three CP939 tests (2136,2156,2178) asserting binding/coverage, descriptor closure of audit-fixture and synthetic-tenant rows, and contract projection with errors==[]; (5) contracts/hrx-people-contract.json carries latest_projection HrxCp939AuditFixtureSyntheticTenantBridgeDescriptor with authority_boundary (claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-940), validation.valid=true, and no_write_attestation all false; (6) scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs chains the full CP897->CP939 upstream/next binding ladder plus coverage, descriptor, and contract validation. Authority boundary holds: Claude is a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false), Hermes is used only for deterministic packet/receipt handling (emits_runtime_receipt=false, deterministic_only=true), and enterprise trust is closed/deferred to human approval. No real client/employee/candidate/payroll/audit data, credentials, or secrets are present; no product-state, audit, or permission writes occur. CP178+ hardening checks pass: the auth preflight returned valid JSON (1434 bytes, exit 0), there are no malformed/0-byte/fenced/tool-call-shaped review-evidence artifacts, and there are no prior invalid CP939 attempts (the c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json file belongs to the unrelated LDIP workstream and is correctly listed in unrelated_dirty_files_preserved/out of scope). One non-blocking P3: command-evidence.json, manifest.pack_level_claude_review, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, and claude-review-result.json are all in the expected pre-review pending state (only HRX-local commands recorded exit 0; the broader closeout validation ladder and a recorded review receipt remain pending) -- this is the normal condition this review gates, not a defect, and the artifacts correctly hold production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / status=in_progress. No P0/P1/P2 findings; nothing blocks this CP closeout goal.

findings.title: Full validation ladder and review receipt pending in closeout artifacts (expected pre-review state)
findings.details: command-evidence.json records only HRX-local checks (node --check on registry.js/validators.js/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs, node --test on packages/hrx/test/*.test.js, npm run rp30:hrx:validate) with exit_code 0 and marks status=pending_final_validation with hermes_gate.status=pending. The broader closeout ladder named in the review baseline (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet evidenced, and manifest.pack_level_claude_review (status=pending_hardened_review, review_receipt_ref=null, verdict=null), construction-inspection.json (verdict=PENDING), adjudication.md (PENDING), and claude-review-result.json (overall_verdict=PENDING) are all still in their pre-review state. This is the expected condition that this read-only review gates, and the artifacts correctly hold production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / status=in_progress, so it is not a defect. Note: as a read-only reviewer I did not re-execute any command; the exit_code 0 values are as reported in command-evidence.json.
findings.recommendation: Before flipping CP00-939 to closed, run the full validation ladder and confirm each command passes, record exactly one valid hardened read-only review receipt, and update manifest.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, and claude-review-result.json with the resulting verdict and receipt_ref.
